name: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A - Ameris Lgt Secondaries V FI Fund
summary: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A - Ameris Lgt Secondaries V FI Fund invests in secondary private equity investments (likely through LGT Capital Partners). It is managed by Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. The fund aims to generate returns by acquiring existing private equity fund interests in the secondary market.
